title: Andrej Karpathy
html: Stub. Speculative entity — first mentioned in 2024 05 13 things as the possible source of an uncited "create more value than you capture" / infinite-game quote Yahir saved alongside his disruption thesis menu. Possible influence on his AI / disruption worldview alongside mark cuban and the GPT-4o demo that he flagged as "monumental" the same week.
